pr_title: Create a ref-assembly package for HttpHandler
pr_body:
Fixes https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore/issues/19202

------------------------

This adds a package to carry a ref assembly for WebAssemblyHttpHandler. The current contents resemble what's currently in the runtime, we can update it once the HttpHandler changes are in the runtime. I choose `Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.WebAssembly.HttpHandler` as the package name since it's meant to be a stop-gap until the runtime package is available in .NET 5.0. We can move this code over to dotnet/Blazor once we're ok with the shape of this change.
